Highlights & Team

Meet the 2026 fellows

List of Team members and members Research Highlights listed down in the page

Team Members

Fellows

  • Maya Chen

    Software Engineering ’28 · Mentor: Prof. Reyes

    Rebuilding the plugin update-check API for reliability under load.

  • Jordan Osei

    Computer Science ’27 · Mentor: Prof. Naik

    Prototyping a faster block-editor rendering path for large posts.

  • Priya Patel

    Software Engineering ’28 · Mentor: Prof. Reyes

    Auditing core plugins for common OWASP vulnerabilities.

  • Lucas Ferreira

    Computer Science ’27 · Mentor: Prof. Whitfield

    Adding screen-reader support to the media library grid.

  • Sofia Marino

    Software Engineering ’29 · Mentor: Prof. Naik

    Building a caching layer for high-traffic REST endpoints.

  • Daniel Kim

    Computer Science ’28 · Mentor: Prof. Whitfield

    Keyboard-navigation pass across the admin dashboard widgets.

Research Highlights

Research highlights

  • Plugin Architecture

    Plugin Health Dashboard

    A lightweight admin widget surfacing update failures and dependency conflicts across a multisite network before they cause downtime.

    Built by Maya Chen, Priya Patel

  • Editor & Block UX

    Focus-Mode Block Editor

    An opt-in distraction-free writing mode for the block editor, cutting visual chrome without losing block controls.

    Built by Jordan Osei

  • Accessibility

    Automated A11y Linter

    A CI check that flags missing alt text and low-contrast theme combinations before a build ships.

    Built by Lucas Ferreira, Daniel Kim

  • Performance & Security

    Edge Cache Layer

    A drop-in object-cache backend that cut average REST response time by 40% on a test multisite install.

    Built by Sofia Marino
